published_prior_art.cite: CortezEichhornYu2022, https://arxiv.org/abs/2205.14552, derives network-free unbiased TTE estimation from the low-degree rollout polynomial identity

repo_prior_art.cite: exp_saturation_skew_threshold_v1 concerns saturation-design moment programs, not rollout interpolation weights or node placement

published_prior_art.cite: CortezEichhornYu2022 fixes interpolation nodes and EichhornKhanUganderYu2024, https://arxiv.org/abs/2405.07979, gives a pseudoinverse estimator for general low-order designs, but neither optimizes this TV-envelope rollout schedule criterion

CortezRodriguezEichhornYu2024, https://arxiv.org/abs/2405.05119, studies fixed polynomial-interpolation rollout schedules and high extrapolation variance, but not the proposal's A_beta schedule-optimization benchmark
Routine endpoint algebra not isolated in CortezEichhornYu2022 or CortezRodriguezEichhornYu2024 as a boundary for optimized low-budget node placement

Smith1918, Elfving1952, KieferWolfowitz1959, Studden1968, and CaiPougetAbadieAiroldi2022 are close design ancestors, but I found no causal rollout TTE TV-envelope minimax schedule theorem subsuming this kernel
CortezEichhornYu2022 and CortezRodriguezEichhornYu2024 analyze fixed rollout schedules and clustering, not optimal nodes under the exact nested covariance Gamma_P(p)

accepted_scope_caveats.label: thm:tv-envelope-design / ass:round-mean-variance-envelope
accepted_scope_caveats.caveat: The optimal-node theorem is conditional on the novel TV round-mean variance envelope rather than deriving that envelope from primitive graph/local-dependence assumptions.
accepted_scope_caveats.bound_claim: The accepted headline is a field-tier optimal schedule theorem for the TV-envelope surrogate, not an unconditional exact covariance theorem.

accepted_scope_caveats.label: oeq:exact-nested-minimax / honest_scope
accepted_scope_caveats.caveat: Exact optimality for the true monotone-rollout covariance Gamma_P(p) is posed only as an open-ended question.
accepted_scope_caveats.bound_claim: The accepted conditional claim excludes equality between the TV-envelope minimax program and R_exact(beta,k,q).

strengthening_paths.suggestion: Give rho_Ch(c,q_max) an equivalent finite-dimensional LP or dual-polynomial characterization so the Chebyshev base is auditable without relying only on its limsup definition.
Add a small beta=2 or beta=3 worked schedule computing W_beta(p), A_beta(p), and the Chebyshev/equal-spacing comparison under the TV envelope.
Tighten the non-subsumption paragraph against classical c-optimal design by explicitly contrasting the l1 TV/noise-robust criterion with l2 Fisher-information c-optimality.
If aiming above field, add either an exact-covariance theorem for Gamma_P(p) or an estimator/inference corollary with a design-based CLT for the Chebyshev rollout estimator.

recommended_next_step: Advance to Stage 0: the field-tier rollout-node kernel clears repo and published novelty, with exact covariance optimality honestly scoped as the follow-on open question.
